name: PSAC Agreed With Authority
description: The Plan for Software Aspects of Certification (PSAC) is agreed with the certification authority before development proceeds.
rationale: DO-178C Table A-10 obj 1: communication and understanding between the applicant and the certification authority is established via the PSAC. Table A-10 applies at Levels A-D.

examples.fails: the required objective evidence is absent

source: RTCA DO-178C / EUROCAE ED-12C — Software Considerations in Airborne Systems and Equipment Certification; objectives per Annex A tables A-1 to A-10.
